candidates.why: The only visible D&A row is a single operating-level total, not specifically tied to COGS/cost of sales, and the selected COGS bucket consists only of direct cost component rows ('Raw material and consumables' and 'Goods for resale'). Adding the consolidated D&A line to COGS would risk misclassification and double counting across operating functions.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortization row is visible above the financial section. Use conservative treatment and do not add the consolidated operating D&A line to COGS.

candidates.why: A separate operating-level D&A line is explicitly presented alongside the selected overhead buckets ('Other external expenses', 'Personnel costs', 'Other operating expenses'). The earlier XSGA selection explicitly excluded depreciation/amortization, so this row appears to sit outside the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket and should be added separately later.

variables.notes: Selected the separate operating D&A summary row for SG&A-related add-back/addition because it is presented as its own line and was excluded from the previously selected XSGA component rows. No separate R&D row is visible, so the special R&D exclusion does not apply.
